problem id: b2fb65cf
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR NOT SHL(6)

examples:
  10101000 -> 01011111
  00000000 -> 11111111
  01101010 -> 11010111
  01101111 -> 10000011
  00000001 -> 10111011
  00011111 -> 01000011
  00001010 -> 01010111
  00001001 -> 10011011
  11000000 -> 11111111

query: 01111111
predicted answer: 11000011
